sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { FaArrowLeft, FaFilm, FaPlus, FaEdit, FaTrash, FaBuilding } from 'react-icons/fa';

const OwnerDashboard = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [movies, setMovies] = useState([
        { id: 1, name: "Animal", shows: ["10:00 AM", "1:00 PM", "4:00 PM", "7:00 PM"], price: 200 },
        { id: 2, name: "Salaar", shows: ["11:00 AM", "2:00 PM", "5:00 PM", "8:00 PM"], price: 250 },
    ]);

    return ( <
        div className = "min-h-screen bg-gray-900" >
        <
        div className = "bg-black p-4" >
        <
        div className = "container mx-auto flex justify-between items-center" >
        <
        button onClick = {
            () => navigate('/') }
        className = "text-white" >
        <
        FaArrowLeft className = "inline mr-2" / > Back <
        /button> <
        h1 className = "text-white text-xl" > Theatre Owner Dashboard < /h1> <
        div className = "w-8" > < /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>

        <
        div className = "container mx-auto px-4 py-8" >
        <
        div className = "bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-8" >
        <
        div className = "flex items-center space-x-4" >
        <
        div className = "bg-red-600 p-4 rounded-full" >
        <
        FaBuilding className = "text-white text-2xl" / >
        <
        /div> <
        div >
        <
        h2 className = "text-white text-2xl" > PVR Cinemas, Andheri < /h2> <
        p className = "text-gray-400" > Owner: Mahesh Gupta < /p> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>

        <
        div className = "bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6" >
        <
        div className = "flex justify-between items-center mb-6" >
        <
        h3 className = "text-white text-xl" > Current Movies < /h3> <
        button className = "bg-green-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg flex items-center" >
        <
        FaPlus className = "mr-2" / > Add Movie <
        /button> <
        /div>

        {
            movies.map((movie) => ( <
                div key = { movie.id }
                className = "border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4 mb-4" >
                <
                div className = "flex justify-between items-start" >
                <
                div className = "flex-1" >
                <
                div className = "flex items-center" >
                <
                FaFilm className = "text-red-500 mr-2" / >
                <
                h4 className = "text-white text-lg font-semibold" > { movie.name } < /h4> <
                /div> <
                div className = "mt-3" >
                <
                p className = "text-gray-400 text-sm mb-2" > Show Timings: < /p> <
                div className = "flex flex-wrap gap-2" > {
                    movie.shows.map((show, idx) => ( <
                        span key = { idx }
                        className = "bg-gray-700 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm" > { show } <
                        /span>
                    ))
                } <
                /div> <
                p className = "text-white mt-2" > Ticket Price: ₹{ movie.price } < /p> <
                /div> <
                /div> <
                div className = "flex space-x-2" >
                <
                button className = "bg-blue-600 text-white p-2 rounded-lg" >
                <
                FaEdit / >
                <
                /button> <
                button className = "bg-red-600 text-white p-2 rounded-lg" >
                <
                FaTrash / >
                <
                /button> <
                /div> <
                /div> <
                /div>
            ))
        } <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>
    );
};

export default OwnerDashboard;
